summary:
The provided evidence does not conclusively demonstrate that cell death in mesial temporal sclerosis is apoptotic; instead, it highlights general neuronal loss and gliosis without identifying a specific cell death pathway. Thus, the most accurate response remains uncertain—supporting “maybe.”  

$\boxed{\text{C}}$
